title: Aave liquidates KelpDAO hacker's remaining rsETH position
summary: Aave (AAVE) announced it has liquidated the remaining rsETH position belonging to the KelpDAO hacker. According to The Block, the move was part of a previously disclosed recovery plan that required a governance process to temporarily adjust the rsETH oracle price. The liquidation was executed on the Ethereum and Arbitrum networks.

title: BTC skeptic Peter Schiff calls Strategy's STRC a Ponzi scheme
summary: Euro Pacific Capital CEO Peter Schiff has criticized Strategy's STRC as a Ponzi scheme that will collapse once its dividend payments cease, BeInCrypto reported. Schiff argued that Strategy will eventually reach a point where its STRC dividend payments become unsustainable. At that juncture, he said, Michael Saylor will have to choose between selling his holdings or the preferred shareholders' stake. Schiff asserted that this structure is destined to collapse and emphasized that Bitcoin itself is a hybrid scam.
author: @CoinnessGL

title: Boltz Launches Non-Custodial USDC Swaps, Bridging Bitcoin Directly to Circle’s Regulated Dollar
summary:
1. Bitcoin Magazine

Boltz Launches Non-Custodial USDC Swaps, Bridging Bitcoin Directly to Circle’s Regulated Dollar
Boltz today enabled trustless Bitcoin-to-USDC swaps using Circle’s CCTP, allowing instant movement between Bitcoin layers including Lightning and the regulated stablecoin accepted by Stripe, Coinbase, Visa, and global institutions — without accounts or custody.
2. This post Boltz Launches Non-Custodial USDC Swaps, Bridging Bitcoin Directly to Circle’s Regulated Dollar first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Juan Galt.
author: Juan Galt

summary: An anonymous, newly created address (0x4E53) withdrew 349,999 HYPE, worth $15.21 million, from Coinbase over the past 24 hours and transferred the funds to a staking address, Onchain Lens reported. Withdrawals from exchanges are typically interpreted as an intention to hold.

title: 21Shares lists Strategy STRC on London Stock Exchange
summary: Crypto asset manager 21Shares has listed preferred shares (STRC) of Strategy (MSTR) on the London Stock Exchange, Decrypt reported. MSTR will pay STRC holders a monthly variable dividend targeting 9% annually. If STRC trades above $100, the dividend rate will decrease, while if it trades below $100, the rate will increase.

title: Kraken launches spot margin trading for US users
summary: U.S. crypto exchange Kraken has begun offering spot margin trading services to its users in the country, The Block reported. The move comes less than a month after Kraken acquired Bitnomial, a Chicago-based derivatives exchange and clearinghouse, for $550 million. Previously, U.S. retail investors often had to turn to overseas exchanges for margin trading due to a lack of compliant domestic options. Kraken's physically-settled margin trading service will allow for up to 10x leverage.
author: @CoinnessGL

title: Khosla-backed robotics startup Genesis AI has gone full-stack, demo shows
summary: 1. Genesis AI, a startup that raised a $105 million seed round to build foundational AI for robotics, has unveiled its first model, GENE-26.5, but also a demo showcasing a set of robotic hands performing complex tasks.
author: Anna Heim
